text: Hello. Hello. Good afternoon. This is Rachel. So I'm calling because their appending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through North Carolina state release program. So far, have you received any updates or notifications about this yet? Yes, so I was asking if you receive the notification about the pending credits on your Medicare plan?
